title: Luffy Laughs Against Kaido
description: On pages 9–11, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.
scene: Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wanted to play for a while longer...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but we have to evacuate before time is up...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is the attack that got, "Sanji- I Gun...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I was even watching out for it...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't get a proper grip on my CLIMA TACT.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My whole body is so slippery... I can't even stand up....!!
